Dummy_Data.description: Flat HCP-level table with monthly TRx (ZORYVE, Other BNST, TCS), quarterly call counts, targeting flags, deciles, and geography for ~39,932 HCPs across Jan 2025 – Mar 2026.

notes: Always double-quote column names with spaces or apostrophes.
ZORYVE Share = ZORYVE / TCS (use NULLIF to avoid div-by-zero).
